# Caveshen Rajman — Portfolio

PLACEHOLDER: Caveshen writes this section. Intended to give AI crawlers the
intended story rather than requiring them to infer it from the site source.

## About

PLACEHOLDER: Who Caveshen is, what this site is for, and how to read it.

## Pages

- / — The Interview: an interactive, adventure-game-styled CV.
- /sheet — The Character Sheet: a static, RPG-flavoured full CV.
- /cv.pdf — ATS-friendly CV download.

## Note on content

All dialogue copy and personal descriptions are marked PLACEHOLDER until
Caveshen replaces them with his own words. The structure, code, and design
are complete; the voice is his to fill in.
